specification: The number of seats in a coach must be at least 10.

ocl: context Coach inv: self.trips->forAll(t | t.passengers->size() <= noOfSeats)
specification: For every trip managed by a coach, the number of passengers must not exceed the number of seats available on the coach.
Each Ticket instance should have a unique ticket number.
The age of a passenger should be non-negative.
Each employee must have a unique identification number.
The base salary of an employee should be a non-negative value.
